---
name: marp-slide-theme-css-guide
description: "Marp Theme CSS Creation Guide"
version: 1.0.0
author: Alexa
---
     1|# Marp Theme CSS Creation Guide
     2|
     3|How to create custom themes based on the official Marpit theme CSS specification.
     4|
     5|Official documentation: https://marpit.marp.app/theme-css
     6|
     7|## Basic Theme Structure
     8|
     9|### @theme Metadata (Required)
    10|
    11|Theme CSS requires `@theme` metadata:
    12|
    13|```css
    14|/* @theme theme-name */
    15|```
    16|
    17|Without this metadata, it won't be recognized as a theme.
    18|
    19|### Basic Theme CSS Example
    20|
    21|```css
    22|/* @theme my-theme */
    23|
    24|section {
    25|  background-color: #fff;
    26|  color: #333;
    27|  font-size: 24px;
    28|  padding: 60px;
    29|}
    30|
    31|h1 {
    32|  color: #1e40af;
    33|  font-size: 48px;
    34|}
    35|
    36|h2 {
    37|  color: #3b82f6;
    38|  font-size: 36px;
    39|}
    40|```
    41|
    42|## HTML Structure
    43|
    44|HTML structure generated by Marp:
    45|
    46|```html
    47|<section>
    48|  <h1>Slide Title</h1>
    49|  <p>Content</p>
    50|</section>
    51|```
    52|
    53|Each slide is generated as a `<section>` element.
    54|
    55|## Slide Size
    56|
    57|### Default Size
    58|
    59|```css
    60|section {
    61|  width: 1280px;
    62|  height: 720px;
    63|}
    64|```
    65|
    66|16:9 ratio (1280x720) is the default.
    67|
    68|### Custom Size Definition
    69|
    70|```css
    71|/* @theme my-theme */
    72|/* @size 4:3 960px 720px */
    73|
    74|section {
    75|  width: 960px;
    76|  height: 720px;
    77|}
    78|```
    79|
    80|Custom sizes can be defined with `@size` metadata.
    81|
    82|## Pagination
    83|
    84|Styling page numbers:
    85|
    86|```css
    87|section::after {
    88|  content: attr(data-marpit-pagination) " / "
    89|    attr(data-marpit-pagination-total);
    90|  position: absolute;
    91|  right: 30px;
    92|  bottom: 20px;
    93|  font-size: 16px;
    94|  color: #666;
    95|}
    96|```
    97|
    98|**Available attributes**:
    99|
   100|- `data-marpit-pagination` - Current page number
   101|- `data-marpit-pagination-total` - Total page count
   102|
   103|## Headers and Footers
   104|
   105|### Header
   106|
   107|```css
   108|header {
   109|  position: absolute;
   110|  top: 30px;
   111|  left: 60px;
   112|  right: 60px;
   113|  font-size: 18px;
   114|  color: #666;
   115|}
   116|```
   117|
   118|### Footer
   119|
   120|```css
   121|footer {
   122|  position: absolute;
   123|  bottom: 30px;
   124|  left: 60px;
   125|  right: 60px;
   126|  font-size: 18px;
   127|  color: #666;
   128|}
   129|```
   130|
   131|## Theme Extension and Inheritance
   132|
   133|### Loading with @import
   134|
   135|```css
   136|/* @theme my-extended-theme */
   137|
   138|@import "default";
   139|
   140|section {
   141|  background-color: #f0f0f0;
   142|}
   143|```
   144|
   145|You can extend existing themes.
   146|
   147|### Inheriting Named Themes with @import-theme
   148|
   149|```css
   150|/* @theme my-theme */
   151|
   152|@import-theme 'default';
   153|
   154|h1 {
   155|  color: red;
   156|}
   157|```
   158|
   159|Using `@import-theme` allows loading by theme name.
   160|
   161|## Class-Based Variations
   162|
   163|### lead Class (Title Slide)
   164|
   165|```css
   166|section.lead {
   167|  display: flex;
   168|  flex-direction: column;
   169|  justify-content: center;
   170|  align-items: center;
   171|  text-align: center;
   172|}
   173|
   174|section.lead h1 {
   175|  font-size: 64px;
   176|}
   177|```
   178|
   179|### invert Class (Inverted Colors)
   180|
   181|```css
   182|section.invert {
   183|  background-color: #000;
   184|  color: #fff;
   185|}
   186|
   187|section.invert h1,
   188|section.invert h2 {
   189|  color: #fff;
   190|}
   191|```
   192|
   193|## Scoped Style (Slide-Specific Styles)
   194|
   195|Use `<style scoped>` in Markdown:
   196|
   197|```markdown
   198|<style scoped>
   199|section {
   200|  background-color: #e3f2fd;
   201|}
   202|</style>
   203|
   204|# Only this slide has blue background
   205|```
   206|
   207|## Background Image Styling
   208|
   209|Background images are processed automatically but can be adjusted with CSS:
   210|
   211|```css
   212|section[data-marpit-background-image] {
   213|  background-size: cover;
   214|  background-position: center;
   215|}
   216|```
   217|
   218|## Math Formula Styling (Marp Core)
   219|
   220|```css
   221|.katex {
   222|  font-size: 1.2em;
   223|}
   224|
   225|.katex-display {
   226|  margin: 1em 0;
   227|}
   228|```
   229|
   230|## List Styling
   231|
   232|```css
   233|ul,
   234|ol {
   235|  margin: 0.5em 0;
   236|  padding-left: 1.5em;
   237|}
   238|
   239|li {
   240|  margin: 0.3em 0;
   241|}
   242|
   243|li::marker {
   244|  color: #3b82f6;
   245|}
   246|```
   247|
   248|## Table Styling
   249|
   250|```css
   251|table {
   252|  border-collapse: collapse;
   253|  width: 100%;
   254|  margin: 1em 0;
   255|}
   256|
   257|th,
   258|td {
   259|  border: 1px solid #ddd;
   260|  padding: 0.5em 1em;
   261|  text-align: left;
   262|}
   263|
   264|th {
   265|  background-color: #f0f0f0;
   266|  font-weight: bold;
   267|}
   268|```
   269|
   270|## Code Block Styling
   271|
   272|```css
   273|pre {
   274|  background-color: #f5f5f5;
   275|  border-radius: 4px;
   276|  padding: 1em;
   277|  overflow-x: auto;
   278|}
   279|
   280|code {
   281|  font-family: "Courier New", monospace;
   282|  font-size: 0.9em;
   283|}
   284|
   285|pre code {
   286|  background-color: transparent;
   287|  padding: 0;
   288|}
   289|```
   290|
   291|## Responsive Design
   292|
   293|```css
   294|@media screen and (max-width: 1280px) {
   295|  section {
   296|    font-size: 20px;
   297|  }
   298|
   299|  h1 {
   300|    font-size: 40px;
   301|  }
   302|}
   303|```
   304|
   305|## Practical Theme Examples
   306|
   307|### Minimal Theme
   308|
   309|```css
   310|/* @theme minimal */
   311|
   312|section {
   313|  background-color: #ffffff;
   314|  color: #333333;
   315|  font-family:
   316|    -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
   317|  font-size: 24px;
   318|  padding: 80px;
   319|}
   320|
   321|h1,
   322|h2,
   323|h3 {
   324|  font-weight: 300;
   325|  color: #000000;
   326|}
   327|
   328|h1 {
   329|  font-size: 60px;
   330|  margin-bottom: 0.5em;
   331|}
   332|
   333|h2 {
   334|  font-size: 40px;
   335|  margin-bottom: 0.5em;
   336|}
   337|```
   338|
   339|### Dark Theme
   340|
   341|```css
   342|/* @theme dark */
   343|
   344|section {
   345|  background-color: #1a1a1a;
   346|  color: #e0e0e0;
   347|  font-size: 22px;
   348|  padding: 60px;
   349|}
   350|
   351|h1,
   352|h2,
   353|h3 {
   354|  color: #61dafb;
   355|}
   356|
   357|a {
   358|  color: #61dafb;
   359|}
   360|
   361|code {
   362|  background-color: #2d2d2d;
   363|  color: #61dafb;
   364|}
   365|```
   366|
   367|## Embedding Styles in Markdown
   368|
   369|```markdown
   370|---
   371|marp: true
   372|---
   373|
   374|<style>
   375|section {
   376|  background-color: #f8f8f4;
   377|  font-family: 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif;
   378|}
   379|
   380|h1 {
   381|  color: #4f86c6;
   382|}
   383|</style>
   384|
   385|# Slide
   386|```
   387|
   388|This method allows applying custom styles without using a theme.
   389|
   390|## Best Practices
   391|
   392|1. **Ensure Contrast**: Maintain a contrast ratio of 4.5:1 or higher between background and text colors
   393|2. **Appropriate Font Sizes**: Body text 22-24px, titles 40-60px
   394|3. **Sufficient Spacing**: Recommended padding of 60px or more
   395|4. **Fallback Fonts**: Specify system fonts for when web fonts fail to load
   396|5. **Print Support**: Define print styles with `@media print`
   397|
   398|## Official References
   399|
   400|For details, refer to official documentation:
   401|
   402|- **Theme CSS**: https://marpit.marp.app/theme-css
   403|- **Marpit API**: https://marpit-api.marp.app/
   404|- **Official Theme Implementation**: https://github.com/marp-team/marp-core/tree/main/themes
   405|
